caption: A man with brown hair, wearing a light green collared shirt and a black blazer, is speaking while seated at a table. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring blue cube logos and the text "BigDataSV 2015" and "theCUBE". In the foreground, a blue graphic banner identifies him as "JOHN FURRIER | @furrier", noting he is the "Founder" of "SiliconANGLE". A water bottle and a white laptop are visible on the table. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a neutral look to a slight smile and then to a more serious expression. He begins with his hands out of sight and later brings them up to gesture in front of him. The lower portion of the screen displays a footer stating "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015", "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room", and "San Jose, CA".
